summary: GH-90 minimal spec is approved for a manifest-only sample read package identity PR. The spec correctly keeps schema, fixture, validator, registry, runtime, write, and cross-repo work out of scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed for `jq empty sites/example/read-public-page/manifest.json .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/GH-90/build-evidence.json .loom/reviews/GH-90.json .loom/reviews/GH-90.spec.json`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-90 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-90 --json`, and `loom review read --target . --item GH-90 --json` at head `20e3b111922cb3054214970209aaafad82239443`. Hosted PR #104 run `28532869991` consumed the review approval and carrier-only head binding, then fell back because the recovery checkpoint still said `build`; this carrier-only update advances the checkpoint to `merge` without changing manifest scope.
follow_ups: Run separate Work Items for GH-91 through GH-98 before treating the package as stable or executable.
